reviews.title: Spoiled Holiday in Ha Tinh
reviews.text:
Arrival at the hotel late. Checking was fast and I was impressed with the room indeed five stars. Next day I went to the reception counter to change some currencies as it stated both in the website and Room welcoming Information book that the service is available in the hotel. I was shock to learn sorry no such service !! Please go to bank and change. But I told them it stated that the hotel has such facilities and was told again no such service !
Okay, no fuss, went to the bank at Vinpearl shopping mall next door. What? The bank do not do foreign currencies exchange. Went to the one across the road, no such service also???? Walk further down two street and learn again every bank do not change foreign currencies!!!! 
Oh No !!! 
With lots of foreign currencies and no local dong, what to do??? Went back hotel and check with hotel again on the exchange of foreign currencies and this time I think is the Manager who attended to me and told me they cannot change because no permission is given??? Okay I ask where can I change some money and she told me she don’t know !!! Oh dear then I ask her if I can can pay the hotel with foreign currencies and was told not allowed!!! Then what I going to do? She said to me again I don’t know !!! No choice but have to call a Friend in Hanoi to bring some money over. Have to waste 3 day doing nothing but to eat, sleep and watch tv!! 
Friend finally arrival with local currency but with only one more night to spend what can I do! Only after my Friend came, she told me to change currencies I have to find a gold shop !! Now why can’t the hotel staff tell me that??? If only they would then my holiday would not be so lousy !!!
reviews.response:

reviews.title: Very good Hotel but with bad management and not well trained staff.
reviews.text: We want o book a Room with extra bed for 2 adult's and 1 child. This was not possible true Agoda. As we arrived at the Hotel they want to charge for the  extra bed 800.000 VND  when  the full room  for 2 adults was costing only 600.000 VND. The managment of the Hotel was hiding behind the "Policy" of the Company. A good management should take decisions and train the staff.  One day we have been in the Bar of the hotel and we did not know that the bar was closing 24 hours. The staff asked for the payment, which is no problem. But after that they switched off the Aircon and the lights, so we could not finished our drinks. It was also not possible to sign food to  room.  In top the housekeeping staff asked our small daugther if she can pay the bill????  The Hotel has an very bad behaviour against  families traveling with children. For such a category of hotel I expect more customer orientation. I have been living 6 years in Ha Tinh and know they can do better. All is about the management.

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text:
Nice hotel, I wouldn't say it's 5 stars thou.

Importantly thou the room was nice, very comfortable bed, nice bathroom.

I was there during the Typhoon Bualoi. Picked this hotel because it's a large reinforcement concrete frame, big central core for stability, knew it would go nowhere during 200km/hr wind gusts. The facade on the other hand, curtain walling system with rain screen cladding and glazing. The mullions were rattling and deflecting with the gusts, the glazing rattling and moving. There was water ingress at the mullions. On my floor a section of the rain screen cladding flew off and a couple

had to move rooms. It was a crazy night.

But the main thing is, no one was injured, the structure survived and the amazing staff delivered breakfast to the room at 8.30am just 2 hours after the main windy conditions had died down

reviews.title: oke, maar niet de prijs waard voor wat je in Vietnam voor die prijs kan krijgen
reviews.positives: Chille locatie en het ontbijt erg goed.
reviews.negatives: Eerste 3 dagen geen waterdruk in de douche, en koelkast werd niet koud. Douchekop ontplofte uiteindelijk, na melding werd het gerepareerd en werkte de douche wel goed. Koelkast werd ook vervangen na maken melding, maar het is een 5 sterren hotel. Dit zou vooraf gecontroleerd moeten worden zodat de kamer gewoon in orde is. Ik moest een dag eerder weg om op tijd bij het vliegveld te komen. Dag eerder uitgecheckt maar toch die extra dag gerekend. Ze vonden het nodig om nog een euro extra te rekenen voor een gedronken flesje water terwijl ik al bijna 80 euro extra bijbetaalde en ik m'n eten uit supermarkt weg heb moeten gooien omdat koelkast niet werkte... (water is niet drinkbaar uit de kraan, ik ging er fout vanuit dat het water complimentair was, mijn fout, maar wie rekent een euro extra als iemand al 80 euro extra betaald voor iets waar geen gebruik van wordt gemaakt, dat zou elkaar wel uit moeten balanceren). Ook geen compensatie aangeboden voor de kapotte douche en koelkast.

reviews.title: Good location but got room for improvement
reviews.text: I recently stayed at Melia Vinpearl Ha Tinh for two nights across separate bookings. The hotel's location is excellent, conveniently situated next to a mall, cinema, and an EV charging station. However, the basement parking area is quite unorganized and shared with the mall, and I had to pay for it. While free parking is available, it's on the curb next to the hotel and may not feel very secure. The breakfast offered is continental, lacking local specialties from Ha Tinh, which was disappointing. On the plus side, the rooms meet Melia's high standards and are quite comfortable.

reviews.title: Melia Vinpearl Ha Tinh
reviews.text:
Rooms with great view, looking down to the city and to a large surrounding area (you can easily see the sea from the higher floors, ie. from 10th floor up)
The rooms clean, quiet, feeling new. The parking is shared with a Vinfast garage with plenty of vacancies, so no need to worry about where to park your car. A merchandise center is just on the 1st floor, next to the hotel entrance. I have no chance to check out the pool nor the sky bar because I arrived late in the night (about 23h00).
The breakfast buffet offers a variety of dishes (and quite delicious). Just don't like the fact that the buffet closes at 9h30 am, so you have to hurry if you travel with children.
All in all, I bet it's the best hotel in town.

Dù sao thì phía khách sạn đã nhanh chóng sửa chữa sai lầm với thái độ tốt và cầu tiến nên mình cũng bỏ qua và hài lòng! Và cần chú ý hơn đến vấn đề vệ sinh phòng. Dù chuyện nội bộ của khách sạn nhưng tôi góp ý rằng không nên phạt bạn lễ tân vì sai lầm đưa nhầm thẻ phòng bởi ai cũng mắc sai lầm và tôi cũng đã bỏ qua và hài lòng với thái độ sửa sai và chấp nhận lời xin lỗi. Nói chung nên rút kinh nghiệm và cải thiện dịch vụ!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The breakfast buffet is not very diverse compared to a 5-star hotel, only on par with a 4-star hotel. The bathroom is slightly old with stained tiles, and the fridge needs to be replaced as it doesn't cool at all. A positive point is the beautiful view from the high floor, a lovely swimming pool, a great location right in the city center and next to Vincom. The staff is enthusiastic and cheerful. Overall, it's still the most worthwhile hotel in Ha Tinh.

all are clean and good and new but have something I want to suggest

2. the clean of hotel is not only because it's new, but because the system of cleaning one day in morning, in the table of lobby, I can see the glass of table not clean, I don't known why? clean the table in lobby is very important in the other 5 stars standard

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Gia đình tôi đưa ông bà và các cháu đi nghỉ hè, chuyến đi 3 ngày 2 đêm từ Hà Nội. Sau khi tìm hiểu thấy rằng chất lượng dịch vụ và giá phòng nghỉ tại Melia Vinpearl tốt hơn nhiều so với các khách sạn mặt biển Thiên Cầm. Sẵn có xe ô tô của gia đình, chúng tôi lựa chọn nghỉ tại Melia Vinpearl. Là thành viên Genius, chúng tôi không chỉ được giảm giá mà còn được nâng hạng phòng. Phòng sau nâng hạng ở tầng trung và có view tuyệt đẹp. Từ phòng có thể thấy được view non nước xa xa và cả thành phố Hà Tĩnh dưới chân mình. 
Hai buổi nghỉ tại khách sạn, các con chúng tôi được ăn sáng, nghỉ ngơi và sử dụng bể bơi của khách sạn. Đồ ăn sáng ngon, đẹp và đa dạng đáp ứng nhu cầu của cả 3 thế hệ gia đình chúng tôi. Sau bữa sáng, các con chúng tôi được giải trí tại bể bơi trong nhà và ngoài trời của khách sạn. Các cháu rất thích bể bơi của khách sạn không chỉ vì đẹp mà còn có đủ phương tiện an toàn, nhân viên nhiệt tình chu đáo. 
Chúng tôi dành các buổi chiều để đưa con đi tham quan và tắm biển. Nhân dịp tháng 7, tháng tri ân anh hùng liệt sỹ, người có công với đất nước, chúng tôi đến thăm quê hương Chủ tịch Hồ Chí Minh và viếng mộ Đại tướng Võ Nguyên Giáp; dạy các con chúng tôi về những người anh hùng dân tộc. Trên những chặng đường đi và về, chúng tôi tắm biển, ăn tối tại bãi tắm Thiên Cầm, bãi biển chân Đèo Ngang.
Buổi tối, về lại phòng khách sạn sạch đẹp, tiện nghi, chúng tôi được nghỉ ngơi hồi phục sức khỏe. Đối với chúng tôi, việc lựa chọn khách sạn Melia Vinpearl cho hành trình này là 1 trong những yếu tố thành công chủ chốt của chuyến đi.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Great location — convenient and well-positioned for getting around, which was honestly the highlight of the stay.
reviews.negatives:
Check-in felt cold; the staff didn't seem happy to see us, which is never a great way to start a family trip. The hotel itself looks tired — furniture and fittings feel worn, and many of the in-room items came across as cheap rather than luxurious. The elevators often had a strong body odor lingering from previous guests, which was unpleasant in such an enclosed space. Our room was too dim in the evenings, and the bathroom ventilation barely worked, leaving smells and humidity trapped after every use.
For a hotel marketed as 5-star, the experience just didn't match the promise. Hopefully a refresh and a warmer welcome can bring it closer to what it claims to be.

reviews.title: "Best" hotel in Ha Tinh - Worst Vinpearl of the brand.
reviews.positives: Very good breakfast. Nice staff. English speaking so-so. Ok gym. It was clean.
reviews.negatives:
Honestly, I've stayed in Vinpearl Da Nang, and Vinpearl Ho Chi Minh and the quality is much better. I believe this is because there is competition. The quality at this hotel is well below what I expect for the Vinpearl brand, and well below the 5 star standard. This is because there is no competition in Ha Tinh. To others reading this, it's the best your going to get. To VinPearl, improve your quality, get some experts in who know how to increase customer value/satisfaction. Place was run down, things didn't work well, broken bits and bobs, and shrieking children in the swimming pool all day. It seems the hotel rents out vast amount of rooms to Vietnamese families for a cheap weekend getaway - so they can bring money in. 
It all boils down to location - it's not very international. As a result, in typical Vietnam style, things get worn down, quality slowly degrades, but no-one cares, or speaks up to fix/optimise it, passive mindset. Best your going to get in Ha Tinh, if it was Hanoi or HCMC, this would be 3 star hotel.
